features.name: struct injection with keyword-renamed field
features.description: Code should include a struct literal/injection expression where a field name was renamed due to being a SystemVerilog keyword (e.g., repeat renamed to repeat_0, repeat_0_0)
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { logic repeat_0; logic repeat_0_0; } my_struct_t;
my_struct_t r3 = '{repeat_0: a.repeat_0_0, repeat_0_0: 1'h1};

features.name: struct field access after keyword renaming
features.description: Code should include struct field access using dot notation where the field was renamed from a SystemVerilog keyword

features.name: struct with duplicate keyword-renamed fields
features.description: Code should include a struct type definition where multiple fields had to be renamed due to being keywords, resulting in fields like repeat_0 and repeat_0_0
features.snippet: typedef struct packed { logic repeat_0; logic repeat_0_0; } my_struct_t;
